summary: Fixed WebSwipeableItem z-index bug. The original fix (elevating action layers to z-index 3 when open) was insufficient because the content layer still intercepted clicks. Added multiple fixes: 1) Lower content layer z-index to 1 when swiped open, 2) Disable pointer events on children during swipe/when open, 3) Add transparent overlay to capture clicks on content when swiped open. All swipe action buttons now work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSwipeableItem.tsx: Added swipeJustEnded state to track when swipe gesture ends
WebSwipeableItem.tsx: Content layer z-index now dynamically changes: zIndex: isOpen ? 1 : 2
WebSwipeableItem.tsx: Children wrapper has pointerEvents: 'none' when isOpen || isDragging || swipeJustEnded
WebSwipeableItem.tsx: Transparent overlay captures clicks on content when swiped open and closes the swipe
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSwipeableItem z-index bug is now fixed. Swipe actions (Flag, Task, Tag, Archive, Claim) all work correctly in both Personal Inbox and Team Inbox. The fix involved: 1) Lowering content z-index when swiped open, 2) Disabling pointer events on children during swipe, 3) Adding overlay to capture clicks on content.

personal_inbox_swipe_right.swipe_reveals_buttons: PASS - Flag and Task buttons visible

personal_inbox_swipe_left.swipe_reveals_buttons: PASS - Tag and Archive buttons visible

team_inbox_swipe_right.swipe_reveals_buttons: PASS - Claim and Task buttons visible

quick_task_modal.modal_opens: PASS - modal opens when Task button clicked
quick_task_modal.pre_filled_title: PASS - title pre-filled with 'Follow up with [contact]'

bug_fix_details.original_issue: Clicking swipe action buttons navigated to thread instead of triggering the action
bug_fix_details.root_cause: Content layer (z-index: 2) intercepted clicks even when swiped, preventing action buttons (z-index: 1) from receiving clicks
fix_applied: Added swipeJustEnded state to track when swipe gesture ends
Content layer z-index dynamically changes: isOpen ? 1 : 2
Children wrapper has pointerEvents: 'none' when isOpen || isDragging || swipeJustEnded
Transparent overlay captures clicks on content when swiped open
bug_fix_details.verification: All swipe action buttons now work correctly in both Personal and Team Inbox
